@title AvalancheGreeter
 @dev Simple starter contract for Avalanche C-Chain deployment

@title EcoLedger
 @dev Access-controlled sustainability action ledger with non-transferable GreenPoints.

@title SimpleStorage
 @dev Minimal storage contract for learning and testing on Avalanche

@title Auction (Exercise)
 @dev Highest bid wins; owner ends auction and sends funds to beneficiary.
 TODO: Add beneficiary and owner addresses.
 TODO: Add highestBidder and highestBid amount.
 TODO: Add ended flag (auction closed).
 TODO: Add event BidPlaced and AuctionEnded.
 TODO: bid() payable: require not ended; require msg.value > highestBid; optionally refund previous highest; update highestBidder and highestBid.
 TODO: endAuction(): only owner; set ended; send highestBid to beneficiary (transfer AVAX).
 TODO: receive or ensure bid() is the only way to send AVAX (so refunds work).

@title Escrow (Exercise)
 @dev Hold funds and release to beneficiary when approved.
 TODO: Add beneficiary address and owner/arbiter address (who can release).
 TODO: Add event for Deposited and Released.
 TODO: Allow contract to receive AVAX (receive() or fallback).
 TODO: release(): only owner/arbiter; send full contract balance to beneficiary.
 TODO: Optional: getBalance() view to return address(this).balance.

@title Multisig (Exercise)
 @dev N-of-M owners must approve before executing a transfer.
 TODO: Store list of owners (array or mapping) and threshold N.
 TODO: Store pending transactions: to, value, approval count, executed flag.
 TODO: Add mapping owner => txId => hasApproved.
 TODO: submitTransaction(to, value): create pending tx; only callable by owner.
 TODO: approveTransaction(txId): owner approves; increment count.
 TODO: executeTransaction(txId): if approvals >= threshold and not executed, send AVAX to `to`, mark executed.
 TODO: receive() to allow contract to hold AVAX.

@title NFT (Exercise)
 @dev Minimal NFT: mint, ownerOf, transferFrom.
 TODO: Add name, symbol, owner (deployer).
 TODO: Add mapping tokenId => owner address.
 TODO: Add Transfer event (from, to, tokenId).
 TODO: Constructor: set name, symbol, owner.
 TODO: mint(to, tokenId): only owner, to != 0, tokenId not already minted; set owner; emit Transfer.
 TODO: ownerOf(tokenId): return owner; revert if token does not exist.
 TODO: transferFrom(from, to, tokenId): require current owner is from; update owner to to; emit Transfer.

@title Staking (Exercise)
 @dev Minimal staking: users stake AVAX, can withdraw later.
 TODO: Add mapping for stakedBalance(address => uint256).
 TODO: Add Staked and Unstaked events.
 TODO: stake() payable: require value > 0, update stakedBalance[msg.sender], emit Staked.
 TODO: unstake(amount): require sufficient staked balance, decrease balance, send AVAX to msg.sender, emit Unstaked.
 TODO: receive() external payable: allow staking by sending AVAX to the contract (e.g. call stake logic).

@title Timelock (Exercise)
 @dev Withdraw only after a delay from when withdrawal was scheduled.
 TODO: Add owner address.
 TODO: Add scheduled amount and unlock timestamp (when withdrawal is allowed).
 TODO: Add event for Scheduled and Executed.
 TODO: receive() to accept AVAX (deposits).
 TODO: scheduleWithdrawal(amount, delayInSeconds): only owner; set amount and unlock = block.timestamp + delay.
 TODO: executeWithdrawal(): only owner; require block.timestamp >= unlock; send amount to owner; clear scheduled data.

@title Token (Exercise)
 @dev Implement a simple ERC20-style token.
 TODO: Add state for name, symbol, decimals, totalSupply.
 TODO: Add mapping for balanceOf(address).
 TODO: Add Transfer event.
 TODO: Constructor: set name, symbol, decimals (e.g. 18), totalSupply; give deployer the full supply.
 TODO: Implement transfer(to, amount): check balance, update balances, emit Transfer, return true.

@title Voting (Exercise)
 @dev Simple on-chain voting.
 TODO: Add a struct or way to store proposals (e.g. name, vote count).
 TODO: Add mapping or array for proposals.
 TODO: Add mapping voter => proposalId => hasVoted (or similar) to prevent double voting.
 TODO: Add function to create a proposal (e.g. only owner).
 TODO: Add function vote(proposalId): require not already voted; increment proposal votes; mark voter as voted.
 TODO: Add function to get vote count for a proposal (or get winning proposal).

@title Intro
 @dev Minimal contract: your first Solidity program on Avalanche

@title Struct
 @dev Custom types grouping related data

documentation.text:
@title Mapping
 @dev Key-value storage: address => value, etc.

@title StorageLocations
 @dev storage (persistent), memory (temporary), calldata (read-only input)

@title GlobalVariables
 @dev msg, block, tx — built-in globals

@title ContractBalance
 @dev Receiving AVAX and checking contract balance

@title Visibility
 @dev public, private, internal, external

@title StateVariables
 @dev Variables stored permanently on the blockchain

@title LocalVariables
 @dev Variables that exist only during function execution

@title Functions
 @dev Function types: view (read), pure (no read/write), and state-changing

@title Constructor
 @dev Runs once when the contract is deployed

@title DataTypes
 @dev Basic Solidity types: uint, int, bool, address, bytes, string

@title Array
 @dev Fixed-size and dynamic arrays

@title Loops
 @dev for, while — use carefully to avoid gas limits

@title Conditionals
 @dev if/else, require, ternary
